+# Requirements for a Tiny CLI Summation Program
-### Functionality
-- The program should accept a list of numbers as input.
-- The program should sum up all the numbers in the list and output the result.
-- The program should handle both positive and negative integers.
-- The program should handle an empty list by returning 0.
+## Features
+- Accept a list of numbers as input.
+- Sum the numbers and output the result.
+- Handle empty input gracefully, returning 0.
-### Input
-- The program should accept input from the command line.
-- The input should be a space-separated list of numbers.
+## Input Format
+- The program should accept a space-separated list of numbers as input from the command line.
-### Output
-- The program should output the sum of the numbers on the command line.
-- The output should be a single integer.
+## Output Format
+- The program should print the sum of the numbers to the standard output.
-### Error Handling
-- The program should handle invalid input gracefully (e.g., non-numeric characters) by printing an error message and exiting with a non-zero status code.
+## Error Handling
+- If no numbers are provided, the program should return 0.
